# Web viewer third-party licenses

This directory contains license files for third-party JavaScript, CSS, font, and icon libraries used by the pyopendrive web viewer.

## Included Libraries

The pyopendrive web viewer (`pyopendrive/web/`) uses the following open-source libraries:

### Mapping & Editing
- **MapLibre GL** (v5.7.1) - Web mapping library for OpenDRIVE visualization
  - License: BSD 3-Clause License
  - Repository: https://github.com/maplibre/maplibre-gl-js

- **Geoman** (@geoman-io/maplibre-geoman-free v0.7.1) - Geometry editing tools for MapLibre GL
  - License: MIT License
  - Repository: https://github.com/geosolutions-it/maplibre-gl-geoman

- **MapLibre GL Geo Editor** (v0.7.3) - Feature editing capabilities for OpenDRIVE geometry
  - License: AGPL-3.0 License
  - Repository: https://github.com/Equim-chan/maplibre-gl-geo-editor

### UI & Styling
- **Bootstrap** - CSS framework for responsive design and UI components
  - License: MIT License
  - Repository: https://github.com/twbs/bootstrap

- **Font Awesome** - Icon library for toolbar and UI elements
  - License: CC BY 4.0 License (icons), MIT License (fonts)
  - Repository: https://github.com/FortAwesome/Font-Awesome

## License Files

Add corresponding license files for each library in this directory.
